candidates.why: Generic D&A line appears in the operating section but is not identified as COGS/cost of revenue related. The selected COGS bucket consists of direct property cost components, and there is no explicit same-level COGS-specific D&A row to add separately.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: This row is explicitly SG&A-related, not COGS-related, so it should not be added to the selected COGS bucket.

variables.notes: No explicit cost-of-revenue/property-cost D&A row is shown above operating profit. Conservatively treat D&A as already embedded or not separately disclosed for the selected COGS rows; adding any visible D&A row to COGS would risk misclassification or double counting.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: Although this is the relevant SG&A D&A row, it appears to be a component within the selected parent row 'Central administrative expenses' because 'Central Administration - Balancing value' plus this depreciation line approximately equals 'Central administrative expenses'. Therefore it should not be added separately.

Generic D&A line is less clearly attributable, and the statement structure around 'Central administrative expenses' already shows SG&A depreciation as a nested component. Adding this separately would risk double counting.

variables.notes: Selected XSGA parent row is 'Central administrative expenses'. The nearby breakdown strongly indicates that 'Depreciation in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses' is already embedded in that selected row, so no separate XSGA_DA add-back is needed.
